# Confluence CLI

> A TypeScript command-line interface for Atlassian Confluence (Cloud + Data Center). Fork of [pchuri/confluence-cli](https://github.com/pchuri/confluence-cli) (JS), rewritten to TypeScript with features inspired by [rvben/confluence-cli](https://github.com/rvben/confluence-cli) (Rust).

## Documentation

- [README.md](https://github.com/S2P2/confluence-cli#readme): Installation, usage, configuration, and full command reference.

## Source Code (TypeScript)

All source lives in `src/`:

- [src/index.ts](./src/index.ts): CLI entry point.
- [src/cli.ts](./src/cli.ts): Command registration, wires all command modules.
- [src/config/](./src/config/): Config types, loader (backward-compatible with flat JS format), profile management.
- [src/client/](./src/client/): HTTP client and API clients for pages, blog, labels, comments, attachments, properties, search, spaces.
- [src/commands/](./src/commands/): Commander.js command registrations — one file per resource (pages, blog, labels, etc.).
- [src/format/](./src/format/): Output formatters (JSON, text tables).
- [src/analytics.ts](./src/analytics.ts): Local usage stats (no telemetry).

## Key Features

- **Grouped commands**: `space list`, `space get`, `blog create`, `label add`, `comment list`, etc. Flat aliases (`spaces`, `comments`, `property-list`) kept for backward compatibility.
- **New commands**: `doctor` (config/auth/connectivity diagnostics), `blog list/get/create/update/delete`, `label list/add/remove`, `space get`.
- **Search filters**: `search <query> --space <KEY> --type <page|blog> --json`.
- **`--json` output** on most commands.
- **TypeScript** with strict mode (`noUncheckedIndexedAccess`, `verbatimModuleSyntax`).
- **Bun runtime** with tsup build (`bun dev -- <command>` to run TS directly).

## Running

```sh
bun dev -- <command>   # Run TS directly, no build
bun run build           # Build to dist/
npm install -g .        # Install globally
```
